name: Spleen CT
description: CT of the spleen for evaluation of splenic pathology

findings.technique: Contrast-enhanced CT of the abdomen was performed with portal venous phase imaging.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Spleen
sections.content: The spleen measures approximately [X] cm in greatest dimension and demonstrates [normal attenuation / homogeneous enhancement / no mass / no laceration]. No intrasplenic lesion.

sections.name: Splenic Hilum
sections.content: The splenic hilum demonstrates [no abnormal vasculature / no varix / no pseudoaneurysm]. The splenic artery and vein are [patent].

sections.name: Perisplenic Space
sections.content: The perisplenic space demonstrates [no hemorrhage / no perisplenic hematoma / no free fluid]. No perisplenic abnormality.

sections.name: Other Findings
sections.content: The liver, pancreas, and kidneys are [unremarkable / no mass]. No abdominal lymphadenopathy.

impression:
1. Normal spleen CT.
2. No mass, laceration, or other splenic abnormality identified.
